recommendations.title: Rab Ne Bana Di Jodi
recommendations.overview: A lonely 40-ish man, likely to remain a bachelor, has a chance to find the love of his life when he falls for a vivacious young woman.

recommendations.title: Wedding Association
recommendations.overview: Ismail's son, Tarik returns to his village after long years of being away and announces that he is engaged to a Latvian woman named Nugesha and although he doesn't have the means for it, Ismail still wants to be the one who pays for the expenses of t

recommendations.title: Dead Man on Campus
recommendations.overview: Two college roommates venture out to identify a fellow student, who is most likely to commit suicide as it will help them pass the semester.

recommendations.title: Where Do We Go Now?

recommendations.title: Paulette
recommendations.overview: Paulette lives alone in a housing project in the Paris suburbs. With her meager pension, she can no longer make ends meet.

recommendations.title: It's All About Karma
recommendations.overview: Giacomo befriends a con man, believing that he is the reincarnation of his dead father.

recommendations.title: Housefull
recommendations.overview: Believing himself to be a jinx and bringing bad luck upon himself and others, a man attempts to find true love, but ends up in very complicated relationships.

recommendations.title: The Girl with the Red Scarf
recommendations.overview: İlyas, a truck driver from Istanbul, arrives in a remote village to work on a dam construction project and meets a young village woman named Asya. They fall madly in love and get married. However, their life together is fraught with conflict. When İl

recommendations.title: The Ballad of Narayama
recommendations.overview: In a small village in a valley everyone who reaches the age of 70 must leave the village and go to a certain mountain top to die. If anyone should refuse they would disgrace their family. Old Orin is 69. This winter it is her turn to go to the mounta

recommendations.title: Charlie and the Chocolate Factory
recommendations.overview: A young boy wins a tour through the most magnificent chocolate factory in the world, led by the world's most unusual candy maker.
